reference: Hello. I can understand your concern and your symptoms could be related to a tension-type headache. You may have poor posture. Waking up at midnight can occur due to asthma or a panic attack. For this reason, it is essential to perform a pulmonary function test and a cervical spine X-ray study.
text: Hello. I can understand your concern and your symptoms could be related to a tension-type headache. You may have poor posture. Waking up at midnight can occur due to asthma or a panic attack. For this reason, it is essential to perform a pulmonary function test and a cervical spine x-ray study.
